# Cube data catalog

<!-- GENERATED FILE ‚Äî do not edit by hand. Regenerate with:
     uv run scripts/generate_cube_reference.py -->

Every analyst-facing Cube view and the fields it exposes. Only members a view
publishes appear here ‚Äî private cubes never surface. For how access is resolved
and how to connect, see the [Cube guide](../guides/cube.md).

## Views by domain

### Staff

- [Staff Directory](#view-staff-directory) (`staff_directory`) ‚Äî Open staff
  directory ‚Äî roster, employment history, and work-contact info.
- [Staff PII](#view-staff-pii) (`staff_pii`) ‚Äî Sensitive staff PII ‚Äî personal
  contact info, date of birth, and demographics ‚Äî split out of the open staff
  directory (see staff_directory).

### Student Assessments

- [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view)
  (`student_assessment_scores_view`) ‚Äî Assessment scores across internal
  Illuminate interims and NJ/FL state assessments ‚Äî row-level (one row per
  student x assessment x administration x response type) and aggregate
  breakdowns in a single view.

### Student Attendance

- [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view)
  (`student_attendance_view`) ‚Äî Student attendance ‚Äî row-level (one row per
  student √ó school day with attendance recorded) and aggregate breakdowns in a
  single view.

### Students

- [Student Enrollments](#view-student-enrollments-view)
  (`student_enrollments_view`) ‚Äî Point-in-time student enrollment ‚Äî row-level
  (one row per enrolled student-day, for roster exports and questions like "who
  was enrolled on October 1?"; pin a single date by filtering dates_date_day)
  and aggregate headcount breakdowns in a single view.
- [Student Section Enrollments](#view-student-section-enrollments-view)
  (`student_section_enrollments_view`) ‚Äî Student section enrollments ‚Äî row-level
  (one row per student x section enrollment) and aggregate headcounts in a
  single view.

and the description; each row links to a domain section with the full per-view
field lists. (Tags render as chips once the page's script loads.)

| `avg_scale_score`                    | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `measure` `number` ‚Äî Grain: recomputes at any query grain, but meaningful only within a single assessment source/subject/grade ‚Äî scale scores are not comparable across sources, so pooling them is a silent-failure trap (numerically valid, semantically meaningless). Nullable for non-physical rows (e.g., campus rollups).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `count_scores`                       | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `measure` `count` ‚Äî Scored-response count. COUNT(*) over the unique PK (assessment_score_key) ‚Äî additive, so pre-aggregations roll it up to any grain.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `count_students`                     | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Distinct students (per student-year) with a score in the filtered slice. Exact count_distinct ‚Äî non-additive, so a rollup pre-aggregation cannot re-aggregate it to a coarser grain; switch to count_distinct_approx (HLL) if/when this is pre-aggregated and an approximate distinct is acceptable.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `course_code`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî PowerSchool course number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `course_title`                       | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Course name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `credit_type`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Credit type for the course.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `date_day`                           | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî Timestamp cast of date_key. Required by Cube for date dimension joins.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `date_taken`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî Date the assessment was taken (completion date), as a standalone date dimension not joined to a calendar cube ‚Äî date_taken is corrupt for a small share of rows, so calendar rollups belong on the administration date (student_assessment_administrations -> dates). Populated for state; nullable for internal rows lacking a recorded sitting.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `discipline`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Course discipline from the course-subject crosswalk ‚Äî broad grouping (ELA, Math, Science, Social Studies, CCR, World Language). Distinct from the assessment's academic_subject, which is the granular subject tested. (dim_courses.academic_subject is sourced from csc.discipline.)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `district_student_identifier`        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Host public school district's identifier for the student. Populated for Miami (MDCPS student ID) and null for NJ regions where the host district's ID is not surfaced upstream. Generalizes the previously Miami-only mdcps_student_identifier. Ed-Fi District / CEDS District-assigned number from the host district's perspective.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `enrollment_resolution`              | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî How the section enrollment was resolved: subject_section or homeroom. Filter to subject_section for course/section-level rollups.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `enrollment_status`                  | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Current enrollment status of the student. Values: Currently Enrolled, Pre-registered, Inactive, Transferred Out, Graduated, Imported as Historical.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `entry_date`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî Date the student enrolled in this section. Cast to TIMESTAMP for Cube time joins.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `exit_date`                          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî Date the student left this section. Cast to TIMESTAMP for Cube time joins.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `full_name`                          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Student's full name in "Last, First, Mi." format. Matches dim_staff.full_name naming.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `gender_identity`                    | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` `sensitive` ‚Äî Self-identified gender for the student (e.g., M=Male F=Female). Matches Ed-Fi's genderIdentity attribute (modern inclusive naming).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `grade_band`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Grade band served (ES, MS, HS).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `grade_level`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî The grade the student is in. Since this is an integer: 0=Kindergarten, -2=Preschool.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `grade_level_tested`                 | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Grade level the assessment targets. Null for college-entrance assessments.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `graduation_year`                    | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Student graduation year.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `identifier`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Section number for this class.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `iep_classification`                 | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî IEP placement classification for this enrollment stint (latest span). Examples: Resource Center, In-Class Resource, Self-Contained. NULL when no IEP span exists.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `is_dropped_course`                  | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if all enrollments for this student x course x year were dropped.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `is_dropped_section`                 | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if this section enrollment was dropped mid-term (negative section id + early exit).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `is_ell`                             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student was classified as an English Language Learner during this enrollment stint. FALSE when no ELL span exists for the stint. Newark, Camden, and Paterson draw from historical LEP entry/exit dates; Miami uses a single current-state span.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `is_foundations`                     | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if this is a Foundations (intervention) course, per the course-subject crosswalk.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `is_gifted`                          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student has a gifted-and-talented identification on either the PowerSchool NJ extension or Miami user-fields extension.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `is_iep`                             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student had an active Individualized Education Program during this enrollment stint. Derived from the latest IEP span by effective date.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `is_internal_assessment`             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE for KIPP-created internal assessments via Illuminate; FALSE for state and college.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `is_mastery`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student met the mastery/proficiency threshold for this assessment.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `is_meal_eligible`                   | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student was eligible for free, reduced-price, or direct certification meals during this enrollment stint.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `is_replacement`                     | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if this score replaces an earlier attempt. Null for state.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `is_retained_year`                   | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student repeated this grade level in the same school compared to the prior academic year.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `lea_student_identifier`             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` `sensitive` ‚Äî KIPP's own SIS identifier for the student. KIPP is a charter Local Education Agency (LEA) operating within a host public school district; this column is the identifier issued by KIPP as the LEA. Sourced from the SIS student number for NJ regions (and Focus local ID for Miami once Focus lands). Maps to Ed-Fi District / CEDS District-assigned number from KIPP-as-LEA's perspective.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `lead_teacher_staff_key`             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî FK to staff ‚Äî the section's Lead Teacher.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `location_name`                      | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Canonical location name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `meal_eligibility`                   | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Meal eligibility category for this enrollment stint. Values: F (Free), R (Reduced), FDC (Free Direct Certification), P (Paid), Unknown. NULL when no meal span exists.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `module_code`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Module/test code identifying the assessment variant (e.g., QA1, ELA05, sat_total_score).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `module_type`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Module type for internal Illuminate assessments (e.g., QA, CR). Null for state and college.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `month_name`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Full month name (January, February, etc.).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `month_number`                       | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Month number (1-12).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `pct_proficient`                     | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `measure` `number` ‚Äî Proficiency/mastery rate ‚Äî proficient scores / total scores. The headline, source-agnostic metric (the only score measure comparable across the incompatible scales of internal vs state assessments). Built from additive primitives (_sum_proficient / count_scores) so pre-aggregations roll it up to any grain.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `pct_proficient_crq`                 | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `measure` `number` ‚Äî Proficiency rate for Constructed Response Questions (CRQ) across all regions. CRQ is a subset of pct_proficient_formative. Built from additive primitives so pre-aggregations roll it up.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `pct_proficient_formative`           | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `measure` `number` ‚Äî Proficiency rate across all formative module types (Quick Assessments, Multiple-Choice Quick Questions, and Constructed Response Questions). CRQ is included and also available as the standalone pct_proficient_crq measure. Built from additive primitives so pre-aggregations roll it up.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `percent_correct`                    | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Percent correct. Null for state assessments.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `performance_band_label_number`      | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Numeric ordering of the performance band label within the band scale. Null for state assessments.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `period`                             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Period expression encoding the days/periods the section meets (e.g., '1(A-F)').                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `proficiency_level`                  | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Proficiency band label (performance band for internal, achievement level for state).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `race`                               | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` `sensitive` ‚Äî Racial category for the student. Decoded from PowerSchool ethnicity code to a full category label (e.g., Black/African American, Hispanic or Latino, Not Hispanic or Latino, Two or More Races, White). Cross-model consistency with dim_staff.race.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `region_key`                         | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Foreign key to regions. Surrogate key derived from `business_unit_code` so this column hashes exactly the keys produced by `regions.region_key`. Network-level locations (e.g., KIPP NJ) map to KIPP_TAF.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `region_name`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Region name (Camden, Miami, Newark, Paterson, TAF).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `response_type`                      | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Response-type breakdown (e.g., overall, strand, standard). Null for state assessments.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `response_type_code`                 | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Short code identifying the response type. Null for state.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `response_type_description`          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Human-readable response-type description. Null for state.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `response_type_root_description`     | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Description of the root (top-level) response type. Null for state.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `salesforce_contact_id`              | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî KIPPADB (Salesforce) contact identifier for the student. Populated where the student has a KIPPADB record; null otherwise. Used across KIPPADB consumer tools (Overgrad, alumni tracking, etc.).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `scale_score`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Scale score achieved. Null for internal (percent-correct) rows.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `scope`                              | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî How scores link to students: enrollment (tied to a section enrollment) or student.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `semester`                           | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Semester this period falls within. S1 for term_name Q1/Q2, S2 for Q3/Q4. NULL for periods that don't map to a quarter.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `source_assessment_id`               | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Illuminate assessment id carried to the administration grain (the canonical id). Null for non-Illuminate branches.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `special_education_code`             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî NJ state special education code (Newark and Camden only; NULL for Miami and Paterson).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `special_education_name`             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Human-readable label for the NJ special education code (Newark and Camden only; NULL for Miami and Paterson).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `special_education_placement`        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî NJ special education placement category (Newark and Camden only; NULL for Miami and Paterson).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `staff_lead_teacher_first_name`      | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Staff member's preferred first name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `staff_lead_teacher_full_name`       | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Staff member's preferred name in Last, First Middle format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `staff_lead_teacher_last_name`       | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Staff member's preferred last name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `state`                              | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî US state (NJ or FL).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `state_student_identifier`           | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` `sensitive` ‚Äî The state-assigned student number for the student.
