In most cases, this number should stay the same from school to school.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `student_enrollment_key`             | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî FK to student_school_enrollments (resolved school enrollment stint).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `student_key`                        | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Surrogate key derived from student_number. Primary key for the student dimension.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `student_section_enrollment_key`     | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Surrogate key (cc_dcid, _dbt_source_project). Primary key ‚Äî one row per CC record.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `term_code`                          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Short code for the period (e.g., Q1, Q2, PM1, Fall).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `term_name`                          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Display name for the period.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `term_type`                          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Category of period (e.g., academic, PM, survey, assessment, fiscal).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `test_type`                          | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Official vs Practice for college-entrance administrations. Null for Illuminate, state, and AP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `title`                              | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Display name of the assessment.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `year_in_network`                    | [Student Assessment Scores](#view-student-assessment-scores-view) `student_assessments` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Count of years the student has been enrolled in the network. Populated on the student's primary enrollment stint per academic year; null on additional same-year stints.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `ada_tier`                           | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî ADA tier based on cumulative attendance rate through this date. Tier 1 = 95%+ (on track). Tier 2 = 90‚Äì94% (at risk). Tier 3 = 80‚Äì89% (chronic). Tier 4 = below 80% (severe chronic).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `attendance_category`                | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Coarse attendance category derived from the is_* flags with priority ordering (suspension > absent > tardy > present). Values: Out-of-School Suspension, In-School Suspension, Absent, Tardy, Present. Use this column for GROUP BY in BI tools; use the raw attendance_code for specific-code drill-down.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `attendance_code`                    | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Attendance identifier set by school. Examples Tardy, Absent, etc.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `attendance_date`                    | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî _No description._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `attendance_value`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Daily attendance value ‚Äî a real number, typically a fraction of 1 where 1 is a full attendance day. Used with membership_value to compute ADA. Precision depends on the source SIS's attendance mode (full-day vs period-level vs day-part); see source_model for provenance.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `avg_daily_attendance`               | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `number` ‚Äî Average Daily Attendance (ADA) ‚Äî SUM(attendance_value) / SUM(membership_value)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `birth_date`                         | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `time` `sensitive` ‚Äî _No description._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `count_absent_days`                  | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `sum` ‚Äî Total number of absence days (sum of is_absent). Filtered to membership_value > 0 to exclude non-enrollment days while retaining partial-membership days (dual-enrolled students). Not restricted to membership_value = 1 ‚Äî partial days count as absences too.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `count_chronically_absent`           | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Students with cumulative ADA < 90% as of the snapshot date. Always use exactly one of the two CA query patterns ‚Äî never omit both. Year-end / year-over-year: filter is_latest_record = true and group by academic_year. Returns the final CA count per year ‚Äî last day of school for completed years, today for the current year. Use for comparisons like "CA rate in 2023 vs 2024 vs 2025." Point-in-time: filter to a single date_key (e.g. 2025-11-01). Returns CA status accumulated from the start of the year through that date. Use for same-point-in-year comparisons like "CA as of November 1 each year." Omitting both overcounts ‚Äî a student CA on 30 days is counted 30 times. Combining both is valid only when the date equals today.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `count_chronically_absent_month_end` | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Month-end chronic absence count ‚Äî students with cumulative ADA < 90% as of the last school day of each calendar month. Use with timeDimensions granularity "month" for month-over-month CA trends.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `count_chronically_absent_week_end`  | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Week-end chronic absence count ‚Äî students with cumulative ADA < 90% as of the last school day of each PowerSchool school week. Group by dates_school_week_start_date for week-over-week CA trends. Handles shortened weeks (e.g. last school day is Wednesday).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `count_chronically_absent_year_end`  | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Year-end chronic absence count ‚Äî students with cumulative ADA < 90% at the final snapshot of each academic year (last school day for completed years, today for the current year). Safe for year-over-year comparisons without an anchor filter.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `count_students`                     | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî _No description._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `count_truants`                      | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Students meeting truancy criteria across the filtered period. For a point-in-time snapshot, filter to a single date.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `count_truants_month_end`            | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Month-end truancy count ‚Äî students meeting truancy criteria as of the last school day of each calendar month. Use with timeDimensions granularity "month" for month-over-month truancy trends.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `count_truants_week_end`             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Week-end truancy count ‚Äî students meeting truancy criteria as of the last school day of each PowerSchool school week. Group by dates_school_week_start_date for week-over-week truancy trends.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `count_truants_year_end`             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `count_distinct` ‚Äî Year-end truancy count ‚Äî students meeting truancy criteria at the final snapshot of each academic year. Safe for year-over-year comparisons without an anchor filter.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `dates_academic_year`                | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî KIPP academic year (July start). The calendar year in which the academic year begins (e.g., 2025 for the 2025-26 school year). For filtering by year, prefer academic_year_label (the unambiguous "2025-2026" string form) over this integer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `dates_academic_year_label`          | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Full span label for the academic year (e.g. "2025-2026" for the year beginning July 2025). Use this as the canonical filter surface when querying by year ‚Äî it is unambiguous regardless of SY vs. start-year notation. academic_year 2025 = academic_year_label "2025-2026" = SY26. The integer academic_year is retained for sort/group/math only.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `dates_date_day`                     | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî Timestamp cast of date_key. Required by Cube for date dimension joins.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `dates_day_of_week_name`             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Full day name (Monday, Tuesday, etc.).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dates_is_weekday`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE for Monday through Friday.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `dates_month_name`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Full month name (January, February, etc.).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dates_month_number`                 | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Month number (1-12).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `dates_quarter_number`               | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Calendar quarter (1-4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `dates_school_week_start_date`       | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî _No description._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `enrollment_status`                  | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Current enrollment status of the student. Values: Currently Enrolled, Pre-registered, Inactive, Transferred Out, Graduated, Imported as Historical.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `entry_date`                         | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî _No description._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `exit_date`                          | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `time` ‚Äî _No description._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `full_name`                          | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Student's full name in "Last, First, Mi." format. Matches dim_staff.full_name naming.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `gender_identity`                    | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` `sensitive` ‚Äî Self-identified gender for the student (e.g., M=Male F=Female). Matches Ed-Fi's genderIdentity attribute (modern inclusive naming).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `grade_level`                        | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî The grade the student is in. Since this is an integer: 0=Kindergarten, -2=Preschool.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `graduation_year`                    | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî Student graduation year.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `iep_classification`                 | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî IEP placement classification for this enrollment stint (latest span). Examples: Resource Center, In-Class Resource, Self-Contained. NULL when no IEP span exists.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `is_absent`                          | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî 1 if the student was absent, 0 if present. Sum-friendly flag.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `is_chronically_absent`              | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student's cumulative ADA through this date is below 90%. Computed on full membership days only (membership_value = 1). Filter to a single date to get YTD CA status as of that date.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `is_ell`                             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student was classified as an English Language Learner during this enrollment stint. FALSE when no ELL span exists for the stint. Newark, Camden, and Paterson draw from historical LEP entry/exit dates; Miami uses a single current-state span.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `is_gifted`                          | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student has a gifted-and-talented identification on either the PowerSchool NJ extension or Miami user-fields extension.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `is_iep`                             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student had an active Individualized Education Program during this enrollment stint. Derived from the latest IEP span by effective date.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `is_iss`                             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî 1 if the student received in-school suspension on this date (S, ISS codes), 0 otherwise.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `is_latest_record`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE on the most recent attendance row per student enrollment (partitioned by student √ó district √ó academic year √ó entry date). For completed academic years this is the last instructional day on record; for the current year it is the most recent day with data. Use as a filter (is_latest_record = true) with dates.academic_year or dates.academic_year_label to get year-end CA status for year-over-year comparisons ‚Äî one terminal snapshot per enrollment, no date filter required. Do not combine with a date_key filter ‚Äî use exactly one or the other. Transfer student note: a student who transfers intra-district mid-year has two enrollment records for the same academic_year, so two rows get is_latest_record = true. Cube CA measures use count_distinct on student_enrollment_key. Raw SQL filtering on is_latest_record = true without COUNT DISTINCT will double-count transfer students.                                                                                                                       |
| `is_meal_eligible`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student was eligible for free, reduced-price, or direct certification meals during this enrollment stint.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `is_month_end_record`                | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE on the last full membership day of each calendar month per student enrollment. Use with timeDimensions granularity "month" for month-over-month CA trends. Prefer count_chronically_absent_month_end over the base measure when trending by month.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `is_ontime`                          | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî 1 if the attendance code is not a T-prefix tardy code, 0 if tardy. Note: this is 1 for absent days as well as on-time present days ‚Äî use pct_ontime for an on-time rate that correctly excludes absent days.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `is_oss`                             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî 1 if the student received out-of-school suspension on this date (OS, OSS, OSSP, SHI codes), 0 otherwise.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `is_retained_year`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student repeated this grade level in the same school compared to the prior academic year.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `is_suspended`                       | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî 1 if the student was suspended (any type) on this date. Union of is_oss and is_iss codes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `is_tardy`                           | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî 1 if the student was tardy (T-prefix attendance code), 0 otherwise.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `is_truant`                          | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE if the student meets regional truancy criteria. Miami: 15+ absences in 90-day rolling window. NJ regions: projected absences reach 50+ for the year.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `is_week_end_record`                 | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `boolean` ‚Äî TRUE on the last full membership day (membership_value = 1) of each PowerSchool school week per student enrollment. Group the CA weekly trend (count_chronically_absent_week_end, pct_tier_*_week_end, count_truants_week_end) by dates_school_week_start_date ‚Äî not Cube's ISO week granularity. Correctly handles shortened weeks.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `lea_student_identifier`             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` `sensitive` ‚Äî KIPP's own SIS identifier for the student. KIPP is a charter Local Education Agency (LEA) operating within a host public school district; this column is the identifier issued by KIPP as the LEA. Sourced from the SIS student number for NJ regions (and Focus local ID for Miami once Focus lands). Maps to Ed-Fi District / CEDS District-assigned number from KIPP-as-LEA's perspective.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `locations_abbreviation`             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Short display name for the location.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `locations_campus`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Physical campus name. Multiple schools may share a campus.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `locations_city`                     | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî City. Nullable for non-physical rows (e.g., campus rollups).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `locations_grade_band`               | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Grade band served (ES, MS, HS).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `locations_location_name`            | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Canonical location name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `locations_region_key`               | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Foreign key to regions. Surrogate key derived from `business_unit_code` so this column hashes exactly the keys produced by `regions.region_key`. Network-level locations (e.g., KIPP NJ) map to KIPP_TAF.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `meal_eligibility`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `string` ‚Äî Meal eligibility category for this enrollment stint. Values: F (Free), R (Reduced), FDC (Free Direct Certification), P (Paid), Unknown. NULL when no meal span exists.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `membership_value`                   | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `dimension` `number` ‚Äî The amount of a student's membership this school claims. If a student attends more than one school each one will only be able to claim a certain portion of the membership. The largest number for this will usually be 1 and fractions expressed as decimals. Like .5 or .25.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `pct_chronically_absent`             | [Student Attendance](#view-student-attendance-view) `student_attendance` `measure` `number` ‚Äî Chronic absence rate ‚Äî count_chronically_absent / _count_ca_eligible_students. Same two query patterns as count_chronically_absent: filter is_latest_record = true for year-end / year-over-year, or a single date_key for point-in-time. Must use exactly one.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
